title: TallTalesRP Modpack
description: The official modpack for the TallTalesRP Minecraft server.
body:
This is the _official_ Fabric modpack for the **[TallTalesRP](https://discord.gg/talltalesrp)** Minecraft server. This lightweight modpack includes _optional_ but _recommended_ mods to enhance the experience on our server. ### What is TallTalesRP? TallTalesRP is a 16+ whitelisted medieval fantasy roleplay Minecraft server inspired by DND. It's available only on Java 1.21.1. ### What mods are included in this pack? - [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - [Logical Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/logical-zoom) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - [Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play)](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap-fair)

If you have any questions or concerns, please open a support ticket in [our discord](https://discord.gg/talltalesrp)
